message:
fix: Request body falsy-value bug — empty bytes body lost type

`body or ""` evaluates empty bytes (b"") as falsy, replacing it with
a string. Use `body if body is not None else ""` to preserve type.

files.patch:
@@ -62,7 +62,7 @@ def __init__(self, method="GET", url="", headers=None, body=None):
         self.method = method
         self.url = url
         self.headers = Headers(headers) if not isinstance(headers, Headers) else headers
-        self._body = body or ""
+        self._body = body if body is not None else ""
 
     @property
     def _parsed_url(self):
